message:
feat(storage): add batch upsert, FTS5 search, and migration framework to SQLite backend

Substantial expansion of the SQLite storage layer with three key areas:

1. Batch upsert support: add upsert_issues() method that wraps multiple
   issue inserts in a single transaction with INSERT OR REPLACE semantics,
   dramatically improving import throughput for JSONL bulk loads.

2. Full-text search: integrate FTS5 virtual table (issues_fts) covering
   title and description columns with rank-based ordering. The FTS index
   is automatically populated via triggers on the main issues table.

3. Schema migration framework: add a migrations table and versioned
   migration runner that executes DDL upgrades idempotently on open.
   Current migrations: v1 (base schema), v2 (FTS5 index).

Also updates:
- Cargo.toml: add rusqlite and serde_json dependencies for the expanded
  storage layer
- Cargo.lock: resolve new dependency tree
- .beads/issues.jsonl: track related issue status updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
